name: Zoho Books
shortDescription: Integration with Zoho Books, Zoho's online accounting platform. Manage contacts, items, invoices, estimates, sales and purchase orders, bills, expenses, customer and vendor payments, credit notes, and recurring invoices through a single OAuth2-connected service. Works across any Zoho data center and emits realtime webhook and polling triggers for accounting events.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Creates a new customer or vendor contact in Zoho Books. Supports primary contact details, billing address, shipping address, and tax-relevant fields.

actions.name: Get Contact
actions.description: Retrieves the full details of a single contact in Zoho Books, including contact persons, addresses, and balance information.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Updates an existing Zoho Books contact. Provide a fields object containing any subset of contact properties to merge into the existing record (for example contact_name, company_name, billing_address, etc.).

actions.name: Delete Contact
actions.description: Deletes a contact from Zoho Books. Contacts that have transactions associated with them cannot be deleted; consider archiving instead.

actions.name: List Contacts
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of contacts from Zoho Books with optional search and contact-type filters. Returns the full contact records for downstream processing.

actions.name: Create Invoice
actions.description: Creates a new invoice in Zoho Books for a customer. Line items can reference Zoho Books items by item_id or specify name and rate inline. Supports invoice date, due date, notes, and terms.

actions.name: Get Invoice
actions.description: Retrieves the complete details of a single invoice including line items, totals, customer information, and current status.

actions.name: Update Invoice
actions.description: Updates an existing invoice in Zoho Books. Pass any subset of invoice fields (line_items, due_date, notes, etc.); the provided fields are merged into the existing invoice.

actions.name: Delete Invoice
actions.description: Permanently deletes an invoice from Zoho Books. Use with caution; sent or paid invoices may not be deletable depending on organization settings.

actions.name: Mark Invoice Sent
actions.description: Transitions an invoice from draft to sent status without actually emailing it. Useful when invoices are delivered through other channels but still need to be marked as outstanding.

actions.name: Void Invoice
actions.description: Voids an invoice in Zoho Books. Voided invoices remain in the system for auditing but no longer count against the customer's outstanding balance.

actions.name: Email Invoice
actions.description: Emails an invoice to one or more recipients with optional CC, custom subject, and body. Useful for triggering ad-hoc invoice deliveries from automated workflows.

actions.name: List Invoices
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of invoices with optional status and customer filters. Returns the full invoice records including totals and balances.

actions.name: Create Estimate
actions.description: Creates a new estimate (quote) for a customer with line items, dates, and optional notes and terms.

actions.name: Get Estimate
actions.description: Retrieves the full details of a single estimate including line items, totals, and current status.

actions.name: Update Estimate
actions.description: Updates an existing estimate by merging the provided fields into the existing record.

actions.name: Delete Estimate
actions.description: Permanently deletes an estimate from Zoho Books.

actions.name: Mark Estimate Accepted
actions.description: Marks an estimate as accepted by the customer, useful for tracking conversions in sales workflows.

actions.name: Mark Estimate Declined
actions.description: Marks an estimate as declined by the customer for accurate sales pipeline reporting.

actions.name: Convert Estimate To Invoice
actions.description: Converts an accepted estimate into a new invoice in Zoho Books, copying the line items and customer details so billing can proceed.

actions.name: Record Customer Payment
actions.description: Records a payment received from a customer and applies it to an invoice. Supports specifying the payment mode (cash, bank transfer, credit card, etc.) and a reference number.

actions.name: Get Customer Payment
actions.description: Retrieves a single customer payment by ID, including the invoices it was applied to and remaining unused amounts.

actions.name: Delete Customer Payment
actions.description: Deletes a customer payment, restoring the related invoice balances.

actions.name: Create Bill
actions.description: Creates a new vendor bill in Zoho Books, capturing line items, dates, and an optional bill number for reconciliation.

actions.name: Get Bill
actions.description: Retrieves a single bill by ID with full line item details, totals, and payment status.

actions.name: Update Bill
actions.description: Updates an existing bill by merging the supplied fields into the existing record.

actions.name: Delete Bill
actions.description: Permanently deletes a vendor bill from Zoho Books.

actions.name: Mark Bill Open
actions.description: Transitions a bill from draft to open, making it visible in payable reports and ready for vendor payments to be applied.

actions.name: Mark Bill Void
actions.description: Voids a bill in Zoho Books. Voided bills remain in the system for auditing but no longer affect outstanding payables.

actions.name: Record Vendor Payment
actions.description: Records a payment made to a vendor and applies it to an outstanding bill. Supports payment mode and date specification.

actions.name: Create Expense
actions.description: Records an expense transaction in Zoho Books. Requires a GL expense account and the account the funds were paid from. Optionally associate with a vendor and a billable customer.

actions.name: Get Expense
actions.description: Retrieves a single expense record by ID with the full detail set including the source account and any billable customer.

actions.name: Update Expense
actions.description: Updates an existing expense by merging the supplied fields into the existing record.

actions.name: Delete Expense
actions.description: Permanently deletes an expense from Zoho Books.

actions.name: List Expenses
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of expenses with optional filters. Useful for syncing expense data into reporting or reimbursement workflows.

actions.name: Create Item
actions.description: Creates a new product or service item in Zoho Books. Items are reusable line entries used by invoices, estimates, and bills.

actions.name: Get Item
actions.description: Retrieves a single item by ID with full configuration including rate, accounts, and tax settings.

actions.name: Update Item
actions.description: Updates an existing item by merging the provided fields into the existing record.

actions.name: Delete Item
actions.description: Permanently deletes an item from Zoho Books. Items currently used in transactions cannot be deleted.

actions.name: Create Sales Order
actions.description: Creates a new sales order in Zoho Books for tracking customer commitments before invoicing.

actions.name: Get Sales Order
actions.description: Retrieves a single sales order by ID with line items, totals, and current status.

actions.name: Update Sales Order
actions.description: Updates an existing sales order by merging the provided fields into the existing record.

actions.name: Delete Sales Order
actions.description: Permanently deletes a sales order from Zoho Books.

actions.name: Create Purchase Order
actions.description: Creates a new purchase order in Zoho Books for tracking commitments to a vendor before the bill arrives.

actions.name: Get Purchase Order
actions.description: Retrieves a single purchase order by ID with line items, totals, and status.

actions.name: Update Purchase Order
actions.description: Updates an existing purchase order by merging the provided fields into the existing record.

actions.name: Delete Purchase Order
actions.description: Permanently deletes a purchase order from Zoho Books.

actions.name: Mark Sales Order Open
actions.description: Transitions a sales order from draft to open.

actions.name: Mark Sales Order Void
actions.description: Voids a sales order.

actions.name: Mark Purchase Order Issued
actions.description: Transitions a purchase order from draft to issued.

actions.name: Mark Purchase Order Cancelled
actions.description: Cancels an issued purchase order.

actions.name: Submit Invoice
actions.description: Submits an invoice for approval (when invoice approval workflow is enabled in Zoho Books).

actions.name: Approve Invoice
actions.description: Approves an invoice that was submitted for approval.

actions.name: Write Off Invoice
actions.description: Writes off the outstanding balance of an invoice. Useful for marking uncollectible invoices.

actions.name: Create Credit Note
actions.description: Creates a customer credit note in Zoho Books with line items. Credit notes can later be applied to invoices or refunded.

actions.name: Get Credit Note
actions.description: Retrieves a credit note by ID.

actions.name: Update Credit Note
actions.description: Updates an existing credit note by merging fields into the existing record.

actions.name: Delete Credit Note
actions.description: Permanently deletes a credit note.

actions.name: Apply Credit Note To Invoices
actions.description: Applies all or part of a credit note to one or more invoices.

actions.name: Create Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Creates a recurring invoice schedule that automatically generates invoices on a defined cadence.

actions.name: Get Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Retrieves a recurring invoice by ID.

actions.name: Update Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Updates a recurring invoice by merging fields into the existing record.

actions.name: Delete Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Permanently deletes a recurring invoice schedule.

actions.name: Activate Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Activates a recurring invoice so it begins generating invoices on schedule.

actions.name: Stop Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Stops a recurring invoice so it no longer generates new invoices.

triggers: On New Or Updated Customer Payment (Polling)
idealUseCases: Automating invoice, estimate, and recurring-billing creation when orders or milestones complete
Syncing customers, vendors, and items between Zoho Books and other systems
Recording customer and vendor payments and reconciling outstanding balances
Capturing vendor bills and expenses from parsed documents or receipts
Managing the order-to-cash and procure-to-pay lifecycle, from sales/purchase orders to invoices/bills
Reacting in real time to new invoices, payments, contacts, and bills via webhooks
agentIdeas: When **Stripe** "Create Charge" processes a payment, call **Zoho Books** "Record Customer Payment" to apply it against the matching invoice and keep accounts receivable reconciled.

When a **Parseur** "On Document Processed" trigger emits a parsed vendor invoice, use **Zoho Books** "Create Bill" to record the payable, then **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to flag it for approval.
When a **Zoho Books** "On Invoice Created (Realtime)" trigger fires, use **Gmail** "Send Message" to email the customer and **Google Sheets** "Add Row" to log it in a revenue tracker.
